title: petunia integrifolia subsp. inflata
intro: Petunia integrifolia subsp. inflata, also known as the Inflated Petunia, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, characterized by its trumpet-shaped flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin infections, and sore throats. The health benefits of Petunia integrifolia subsp. inflata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin.
